note_es: Este archivo es la fuente de verdad de rasgos y efectos para la web dinámica. Cambiar aquí actualiza fichas, contadores de bonus/malus y apartado de rasgos. En 2.4.0 se añaden notas de uso en usage_ES.js para objetos/herramientas clave.

traits.description_en_official: Access to exclusive recipes pertaining to clutter, paper, wagon wheels, and aged building blocks
Access to the exclusive tool and armor repair kits, and recipes pertaining to rare armor and weapons, metal building blocks, and common metalworking components
Access to the exclusive blackguard sword and shield
Access to exclusive recipes pertaining to bulk shaping of raw clay and earthen building blocks
Access to the exclusive Sealant and Ice Pack, and recipes pertaining to ranching and food preservation
Exclusive recipes pertaining to mechanical power, item transport and Jonas tech
Exclusive recipe for the tuning spear
Access to the exclusive Angler's Bamboo Raft, and recipes pertaining to fertilizer, rope, and fishing
Exclusive recipes pertaining to flowers, dyeing, medicine, and decorative containers
Access to the exclusive briquette and treated firewood, and recipes pertaining to fuels, storage, and carpentry
Exclusive recipes pertaining to leatherworking and fletching
Exclusive access to the recurve bow and crude arrow
Recipes pertaining to scrap, rusty gears, and torch-holders
Access to the exclusive sling
Exclusive access to the exclusive scroll tube and messenger bag, and recipes pertaining to lighting, roads, and personal storage
Recipes pertaining to stone building blocks, and breaking rock down to stone, gravel, and sand
Exclusive recipes for carbonaceous, metallic, and crystalline paydirt, and recipes pertaining to mineral processing and explosives
Exclusive access to the clothing assembly kit, and recipes pertaining to carpets, thatch roofing, and flax fibers
Exclusive access to tailored gambeson, sewing kits, and numerous articles of clothing
Exclusive access to the fruiting bag to grow mushrooms. Access to recipes pertaining to trees and bushes, glassblowing, and liquid processing

effects.effectLabel_es: daño recibido de criaturas de óxido
effects.effectText_es: -25% en daño recibido de criaturas de óxido.
-50% en pérdida de durabilidad de armadura.
+50% en probabilidad global de ahorrar durabilidad.

effects.effectLabel_es: sin atributos numéricos en traits.json; desbloqueo/rasgo de receta
effects.effectText_es: Rasgo de desbloqueo o recetas: no declara atributo numérico directo en traits.json.

effects.effectLabel_es: recuperación de objetos de ruinas con palanca/crowbar
effects.effectText_es: Permite recoger y reparar clutter, banners, estanterías clutter/lore y vasijas agrietadas compatibles haciendo clic derecho con una palanca/crowbar.
effects.method_es: Palanca/crowbar en mano + clic derecho. No usar pico/hacha; no es cincel+martillo en la versión verificada.

effects.effectText_es: -75% en drop de semillas/brotes de árbol.
-20% en afectación de armadura a velocidad.
